headline: UBS Lifts CF Industries to $140 Price Target: Urea Prices Are Up 77% and the Market Hasn’t Caught On
summary: CF Industries Holdings (NYSE:CF) has been a standout performer in basic materials this year. The stock is up 4.62% over the past week, 35.52% over the past month, and 64.32% year-to-date, trading at $131.67 as of March 26, 2026. Most Wall Street analysts remain cautious, with a consensus price target of just $107.68 across 16 ... UBS Lifts CF Industries to $140 Price Target: Urea Prices Are Up 77% and the Market Hasn’t Caught On

headline: Why Is Mosaic (MOS) Down 2.9% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Mosaic (MOS) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Iran war will spare no major economy, says OECD — but the UK is more vulnerable than others
summary: The U.K. is predicted to be worse hit by the Iran war than its developed market counterparts, the OECD said in its interim economic outlook on Thursday.

raw.headline: Iran war will spare no major economy, says OECD — but the UK is more vulnerable than others
raw.summary: The U.K. is predicted to be worse hit by the Iran war than its developed market counterparts, the OECD said in its interim economic outlook on Thursday.

headline: CNBC Daily Open: Talking in circles on Iran
summary: Iran insists no talks with the U.S. are underway, while G7 foreign ministers gather to discuss de-escalation, sending more mixed signals to the markets.

raw.headline: CNBC Daily Open: Talking in circles on Iran
